title: CL-1003 — Travel claim, lost checked luggage on international transit
content: Customer: Priya Raghavan, returning from Singapore (SQ238 SIN-MEL) on 2026-04-30. One of two checked bags failed to arrive at Melbourne Airport. Property Irregularity Report PIR-MEL-SQ-2026-04-30-118 issued by Singapore Airlines baggage services. Bag was confirmed permanently lost after the airline's 21-day search window expired. Itemised loss schedule submitted by the customer totals $3,180 (clothing $1,420, conference shoes $260, prescription glasses $640, professional camera lens $860). Policy benefit: lost-luggage cover up to $5,000 per insured person, with a $250 excess and per-item sub-limit of $1,000. Outstanding evidence: receipts for the camera lens and prescription glasses (over the $250 single-item proof threshold). Status: at Claims Assessment pending receipt evidence; Customer Communications has issued a templated request for the missing receipts.
